CVE-2011-3012.title: The ioQuake3 engine, as used in World of Padman 1.2 and earlier,  ...
CVE-2011-3012.description: The ioQuake3 engine, as used in World of Padman 1.2 and earlier, Tremulous 1.1.0, and ioUrbanTerror 2007-12-20, does not check for dangerous file extensions before writing to the quake3 directory, which allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted third-party addon that creates a Trojan horse DLL file, a different vulnerability than CVE-2011-2764.

CVE-2019-1010043.title: Quake3e < 5ed740d is affected by: Buffer Overflow. The impact is: ...
CVE-2019-1010043.description: Quake3e < 5ed740d is affected by: Buffer Overflow. The impact is: Possible code execution and denial of service. The component is: Argument string creation.
